name: Bezangah
overview: In the summary of Bezengah series, it is stated that Nader is an addicted man who lives in Karaj with his daughter Darsa and has divorced his wife Maryam. On the other hand, after the death of his father Aus Ahmed, he and his brother Saber, his sister Behjat and her husband are divided over the inheritance and Paternal heritage has been disputed and...
